task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 04-6-002 Get nozzle status [Special Tests]

section.title: Function
section.p: Use this test to get the nozzle status of each printhead.

note.p: Running SDS test 4-6-002 "get nozzle status", right after waking the machine from keep healthy, could produce false results (>300 dirt nozzles per head). This is caused by the ink film on the nozzles. Workaround: First make a small print or perform an Automatic maintenance procedure.
As the UVGel ink might dry out when nozzles are not used the result of this test could produce false results (>100 dirt nozzles per head).
When the test is repeated after several minutes the amount of false results increases.
Workaround : perform 4-6-002 only directly after a purge/wipe.

section.title: Description

li.p: Give an Actual PAINt results overview of the status of each printhead.
There is a real nozzle defect. Permanent and not recoverable.
Can be recovered by automatic maintenance.
Can be recovered by automatic maintenance and/or manual maintenance.

section.p: This overview includes suspicious nozzles detected by M&C unit during the last automatic nozzle optimization.
This is indicated in the lines with the gray background. These are the Last valid M&C results.
There are 2 types of nozzle information:

li.p: The nozzle does not fire in the desired direction. Recoverable.
The nozzles where blocked for some reason. Recoverable.

section.p: If the sum of misdirected and non-jetting nozzles is more than 20, it is possible that the M&C scanner is polluted. In this case, clean the M&C scanner and repeat the nozzle optimization.
